# clickstack_alert (Resource)

Manages a ClickStack alert.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "clickstack_alert" "high_error_rate" {
  name           = "High Error Rate"
  threshold      = 100
  interval       = "5m"
  threshold_type = "above"
  source         = "tile"
  dashboard_id   = clickstack_dashboard.example.id
  tile_id        = "tile-id-from-dashboard"
  message        = "Error rate exceeded threshold"

  channel {
    type       = "webhook"
    webhook_id = clickstack_webhook.slack_alerts.id
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel` (Attributes) Notification channel configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--channel))
- `interval` (String) Check interval: 1m, 5m, 15m, 30m, 1h, 6h, 12h, or 1d.
- `source` (String) Alert source: saved_search or tile.
- `threshold` (Number) Trigger threshold value.
- `threshold_type` (String) Threshold direction: above or below.

### Optional

- `dashboard_id` (String) Dashboard ID for tile-based alerts.
- `group_by` (String) Field to group alert results by.
- `message` (String) Alert message template.
- `name` (String) Display name of the alert.
- `saved_search_id` (String) Saved search ID for saved_search-based alerts.
- `schedule_offset_minutes` (Number) Schedule offset in minutes.
- `schedule_start_at` (String) Schedule start time (ISO 8601).
- `tile_id` (String) Tile ID for tile-based alerts.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the alert.
- `state` (String) Current alert state: ALERT, OK, INSUFFICIENT_DATA, or DISABLED.
- `team_id` (String) Owner team identifier.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.

<a id="nestedatt--channel"></a>
### Nested Schema for `channel`

Required:

- `type` (String) Channel type (webhook).
- `webhook_id` (String) Webhook identifier for notifications.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import clickstack_alert.example 69cafb78dacf4418bedbb180
```
